disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Calf pain that used to come only on walking has become constant even at rest over the last four hours and can no longer be relieved by stopping
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the leg pain — when did it change?
Does the leg pain ease when you rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For months the cramp only came when I walked and stopped when I rested. But for the last four hours it's there all the time, even lying down, and nothing eases it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New heaviness and tightness across the central chest, brought on by walking today, not previously experienced
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the chest tightness.
Have you ever had this chest feeling before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest went heavy and tight after I walked a short distance today — like a weight pressing on it. I've never had that before and it's what scared us.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The affected foot feels cold and looks pale, and the leg feels 'dead'
trigger_question_examples: How does the foot look and feel compared to the other one?
Is the foot cold or pale?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My left foot feels colder than the right and looks paler, and the whole leg feels kind of dead.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sweatiness and clamminess accompanying the chest symptoms
trigger_question_examples: Have you come over sweaty or clammy?
Any nausea or sweating with the chest tightness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've gone all sweaty and clammy since the chest started feeling tight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing high blood pressure and high cholesterol, with prescribed tablets stopped and not currently taken
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions, and are you on any medications?
Were you ever prescribed tablets you've stopped?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had high blood pressure for years and they gave me a blood pressure tablet and a cholesterol tablet, but I stopped taking both of them.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: About eight months of consistent inability to achieve an erection
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any other changes in your health over recent months?
Some men with these blood-vessel problems notice changes with erections — has that happened for you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a bit embarrassing, but for about eight months now I just can't get an erection at all anymore.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not talk about that — it's not why I called tonight.
